# Phase 7: CI/CD Pipeline Updates

## 7.1 Azure Pipelines

**File:** `azure-pipelines.yml`

- `DotNetSDKVersion` is already `10.0.301` (line 60) — verify
- Remove multi-TFM test matrix logic
- Simplify build stages — single `net10.0` target

## 7.2 GitHub Workflows

All 45 workflow files need `setup-dotnet` to use `10.0.x`:

```yaml
- uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
  with:
    dotnet-version: '10.0.x'
```

**Auto-generated workflows** are generated by `Generate-TestWorkflows.ps1`. Fix the generator script, then regenerate.

## 7.3 Remove Multi-TFM Testing

**File:** `TestTargetFramework.props`

Remove the `CI builds — always build all test frameworks` block (lines 52-55). Single TFM only — no `net9.0`, `net8.0`, `net48`, `net472` matrix entries.

## 7.4 Simplify Build Script

**File:** `.build\runbuild.ps1`

- Remove `TestFrameworks` parameter logic
- Remove `projectWithAllTestFrameworks` property (line 52)
- Remove `SetTargetFramework` property group logic
- Single TFM means simpler restore/build/test chain
